response.original_title: It's in the Blood: The Origins of Chattanooga Racing
response.overview: It's In The Blood is a unique look into the lives of some of the greatest race car drivers in the southeast. Featuring stories about Freddy Fryar, Joe Lee Johnson, Bob Burcham, Friday Hassler, Harold Fryar, Charlie Griffith and many others. Their journeys take us from the mountains of Chattanooga running moonshine to the short tracks of the Southeast, to the biggest NASCAR races in history. Each and every one of them had a style of their own and all were on the verge of becoming household names.
response.title: It's in the Blood: The Origins of Chattanooga Racing
